documents.hydro_relevance_reason: The document contains multiple FERC orders directly affecting hydropower and pumped-storage projects, including issuance of an original license for a 1,200-MW pumped-storage project and new/amended licenses for conventional hydroelectric facilities.
documents.ai_summary: H-1 describes FERC's issuance of an original license for the Goldendale Energy Pumped Storage Hydroelectric Project (1,200 MW closed-loop PSH in Washington), while H-2 and H-4 cover amendments and new licenses for conventional hydroelectric projects. H-3 approves license surrender for a storage-only project. Additionally, E-7 addresses ISO-NE's Forward Capacity Market rules regarding the Balancing Ratio cap, which may affect capacity accreditation for hydro resources with Capacity Supply Obligations.
